creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
FYI, I am the coworker which Mark mentioned in #c2.

I've downloaded and unpacked the 

[dvl@sample:/usr/local/www/kibana43/installedPlugins] $ ls  
marvel-agent

[dvl@sample:/usr/local/www/kibana43/installedPlugins] $ ls marvel-agent/
LICENSE.txt                  NOTICE.txt                   marvel-agent-2.1.0.jar       plugin-descriptor.properties


But nothing magical seems to happen with Kibana with respecting to seeing that the Marvel plugin is now installed.

I'm now trying to follow 'Installing Marvel on Offline Machines' at https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/marvel/2.1/installing-marvel.html
